blocks.text: Record-breaking cricket news: Bethell stars as he guides England to impressive win against India. Jacob Bethell hits an unbeaten 76 as England recover from 1-2 to chase down 191 to beat India by four wickets in the second T20 at Old Trafford and take a 1-0 lead in the five match series.
